title: ajax minor var. cuneiflorus
intro: Ajax minor var. cuneiflorus, also known as the Ajax minor, is a plant species from the genus Asteraceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Ajax minor var. cuneiflorus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
